choice_context: A person is deciding which wine to buy or drink based on the description of the wine.

low_pole.label: Light
low_pole.description: Subtle tannins that are gentle and not overpowering.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers a smoother drinking experience.

high_pole.label: Full
high_pole.description: Strong, robust tannins that provide structure and complexity.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of bold and hearty wines.

dimensions.name: Smoke Flavor

low_pole.label: None
low_pole.description: No detectable smoky notes in the wine.

high_pole.label: Strong
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of unique and complex flavors.

dimensions.scoring_guidance: 1 for no smoke, 5 for strong smoke.

low_pole.label: Mild
low_pole.description: Subtle fruit flavors that are not overwhelming.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers more balanced and nuanced wines.

high_pole.label: Intense
high_pole.description: Strong, rich fruit flavors that dominate the palate.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of fruity and sweet wines.

low_pole.label: Low
low_pole.description: Gentle acidity that is barely noticeable.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers less tart wines.

high_pole.label: High
high_pole.description: Sharp and refreshing acidity that cuts through the palate.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of zesty and lively wines.

low_pole.label: Light
low_pole.description: Light and easy to drink with a delicate texture.

high_pole.label: Full
high_pole.description: Rich and full-bodied with a substantial mouthfeel.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of robust and indulgent wines.

low_pole.label: Dry
low_pole.description: Minimal residual sugar, leaving a dry finish.

high_pole.label: Sweet
high_pole.description: High residual sugar content, leaving a sweet finish.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of sweet and dessert-like wines.

low_pole.label: Unwooded
low_pole.description: Minimal oak influence, preserving the wine's natural character.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers wines that reflect their origin.

high_pole.label: Oaked
high_pole.description: Strong oak influence adding complexity and depth.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of rich and buttery wines.

low_pole.label: Mild
low_pole.description: Subtle hints of spice that are not prominent.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers more straightforward flavors.

high_pole.label: Strong
high_pole.description: Distinctive and robust spice notes that enhance the wine.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of spicy and aromatic wines.

low_pole.label: Low
low_pole.description: Lower alcohol content that is not overwhelming.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers lighter and less alcoholic wines.

high_pole.label: High
high_pole.description: Higher alcohol content that provides warmth and intensity.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of full-bodied and warming wines.

low_pole.label: Simple
low_pole.description: Wines with straightforward and uncomplicated flavors.
low_pole.typical_person: Someone who prefers simple and easy-to-enjoy wines.

high_pole.label: Complex
high_pole.description: Wines with multiple layers of flavor and aroma.
high_pole.typical_person: A fan of intricate and layered wines.
